title: lean-business-case artifact schema (native JSON source of truth)
description: Validates the native JSON artifact `<epic>-lbc.artifact.json` directly. Decision 1: JSON is the source of truth; the Markdown rendering is produced from it at the final render step and is never re-parsed. `sections` is the hierarchical body — each key is an H2 heading whose value is a section node ({ body, sections? }); deeper headings nest recursively under each node's `sections`, mirroring the template heading hierarchy.

nonEmptyString.description: Reusable helper: a string with at least one character.

section.description: One body section: its own Markdown `body`, plus any nested child sections under `sections` (recursive — mirrors the template heading hierarchy).

body.description: Markdown body directly under this heading (excluding child headings).

sections.description: Child sections keyed by their heading text; each value is itself a section node.

workItemRelations.description: Typed work-item relations between backlog items.

wsjf.description: Weighted Shortest Job First scoring block used to rank the backlog.

cost.description: Token-cost accounting block (see the cost-snapshot invariant instructions); shape kept lenient here, asserted by the cost actuator.

openItems.description: Clarification + challenge ledger entries (each an object: id, kind, raised_by, owner, blocking, status, ...).

githubSync.description: GitHub Projects sync envelope; filled by portfolio/_sync, null/empty when authoring.

kind.description: Artifact-kind discriminator; the schema selector for native JSON validation (must equal x-artifact.kind).

id.description: Stable artifact identifier (matches the filename stem, e.g. E-1-lbc).

epic.description: Id of the Epic this lean business case shapes (e.g. E-1).

status.description: Authoring lifecycle of the business case.

funding_state.description: Funding posture proposed by the case (decided at the ★ Epic Gate / Participatory Budgeting).

work_item_relations.description: Typed work-item relations (depends_on / enables / related_to / supersedes).

wsjf.description: Weighted Shortest Job First scoring block.

open_items.description: Clarification + challenge ledger (a blocking open entry halts the relevant gate).

cost.description: Token-cost accounting block (see the cost definition).

github.description: GitHub Projects sync envelope, filled by portfolio/_sync (null when authoring).

sections.description: Hierarchical body and the canonical deterministic structure check. Each key is an H2 heading mirroring the template; deeper headings nest under each node's `sections`. This is the JSON source of truth the Markdown render mirrors.

attestations.description: Agent-attested judgment booleans (rung-3 pre/post), keyed by condition id.
